sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75177" key="o(/rmisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὅρμ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n75177.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὅρμος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, metaph., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
